response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio matches the JOYSOUND campaign reference lyrics provided in the JSON, with the last line ending with a shout of the brand name instead of the campaign slogan. 2. JSON Usage: The reference lyrics were used for transcribing the commercial segment from 04:32 to 04:46, with the final line corrected to 'JOYSOUND' based on actual audio. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are aligned tightly to the rapid speech/singing in the JOYSOUND promo.
